rulings.Case Title: 1700 CALIFORNIA HOLDINGS, LLC, A DELAWARE et al VS. TANIA TREDINNICK PEGGS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, September 21, 2011, line 4, PLAINTIFF 1700 CALIFORNIA HOLDINGS, LLC, A DELAWARE, 1700 CALIFORNIA STREET FEE, LLC, A DELAWARE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DENIED, FAILURE TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. FURTHERMORE, TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT EXISTS REGARDING IMPLIED WAIVER BECAUSE THE LEASE EXPIRES IN 2035 AND THE MULLER DECLARATION ALSO SUPPORTS THE CONCLUSION THAT THE PARTIES INVESTED IN THE PROPERTY FOR LONG TERM PURPOSES. MILLER & STARR CALIFORNIA REAL ESTATE SECTION 12:21 INDICATES THAT THE REQUIREMENT OF FAIRNESS SURVIVED THE 1976 AMENDMENTS. HERE, TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT WHETHER IT WOULD BE UNFAIR TO SUBJECT DEFENDANTS, WHO OWN 96% OF THE PREMISES, TO A FORCED SALE. =(302/CWW)
